description_long: This gatehouse features a robust stone structure with a prominent arched entryway, flanked by two thick columns and topped with a decorative animal skull motif. The front facade is adorned with two wall-mounted torches, providing an atmospheric, medieval appearance. The entry is secured by a heavy iron-barred gate with circular handles and a central locking mechanism, set within a wooden double door. The stonework is weathered and textured, giving the impression of age and durability. The rear side of the gatehouse is simpler, with plain wooden doors and no decorative elements. The entire structure sits on a raised stone platform, enhancing its imposing presence and sense of security.
description: A stone gatehouse with an arched entry, iron-barred gate, wooden doors, and decorative skull, flanked by torches and set on a raised platform.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick stone columns and the depth of the arched entryway, with a torch visible on the wall.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the arched stone entry, iron-barred gate, wooden doors, torches, and decorative skull above the arch.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the stone column and partial torch, with the skull motif visible above.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the plain wooden double doors and the back of the arched stone structure, without decorative elements.
attribute_entryway_design: arched stone doorway with iron-barred wooden double doors and decorative skull
attribute_window_placement: no visible windows, only barred openings above the entry
